title: calycera balsamitifolia
intro: Calycera balsamitifolia, also known as Balsam Scurvy Grass, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Calyceraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of scurvy, due to its high content of vitamin C. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Calycera balsamitifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
